sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date, event_value Float64);
SELECT id, addMonths(event_date, 1) AS next_months FROM test_dates WHERE next_months < toDate('2024-02-01') OR event_value < 150.0;
SELECT id, event_date, addMonths(event_date, -1) AS previous_month FROM test_dates WHERE (event_date IS NOT NULL) AND (previous_month < toDate('2023-12-01'));
SELECT id, event_date, addMonths(event_date, CAST(NULL AS Int32)) AS add_null_months FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < addMonths(currentDate(), 0);
CREATE TABLE test_subquery (id UInt32, sub_date Date, sub_value Float64);
INSERT INTO test_subquery VALUES (1, toDate('2023-12-01'), 50.0), (2, toDate('2024-01-05'), 75.0);

SELECT ts.id, ts.event_date, (SELECT MAX(sub_value) FROM test_subquery WHERE sub_date < addMonths(ts.event_date, 1)) AS max_sub FROM test_dates ts WHERE ts.event_value < (SELECT AVG(sub_value) FROM test_subquery);
SELECT id, event_date, if(event_date < addMonths(toDate('2024-01-15'), -1), 'Before', 'After') AS period_status FROM test_dates WHERE period_status = 'Before';
SELECT id, event_date, addMonths(event_date, 6) AS future_date FROM test_dates WHERE future_date > toDate('2024-07-01') GROUP BY event_date HAVING COUNT(id) > 2;
